spec.rawSql:
SELECT
    sum(bytes * if(sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), sampling_rate)) AS observed_bytes
FROM flows_raw
WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'

spec.description: Total sampled traffic observed by the selected switch, scaled by sampling_rate.
spec.title: Observed traffic

spec.rawSql:
SELECT countDistinct(workload) AS workloads
FROM
(
    SELECT concat(src_k8s_top_owner_namespace, '/', src_k8s_top_owner_kind, '/', src_k8s_top_owner_name) AS workload
    FROM flows_raw
    WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'
      AND src_k8s_top_owner_name != ''

    UNION ALL

    SELECT concat(dst_k8s_top_owner_namespace, '/', dst_k8s_top_owner_kind, '/', dst_k8s_top_owner_name) AS workload
    FROM flows_raw
    WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'
      AND dst_k8s_top_owner_name != ''
)

SELECT countDistinct(pod) AS pods
FROM
(
    SELECT src_k8s_pod_name AS pod
    FROM flows_raw
    WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'
      AND src_k8s_pod_name != ''

    UNION ALL

    SELECT dst_k8s_pod_name AS pod
    FROM flows_raw
    WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'
      AND dst_k8s_pod_name != ''
)

SELECT count() AS samples
FROM flows_raw
WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'

SELECT
    $__timeInterval(time_flow_start) AS time,
    workload,
    sum(bytes * if(sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), sampling_rate)) AS observed_bytes
FROM
(
    SELECT
        time_flow_start,
        concat(src_k8s_top_owner_namespace, '/', src_k8s_top_owner_kind, '/', src_k8s_top_owner_name) AS workload,
        bytes,
        sampling_rate
    FROM flows_raw
    WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
      AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'
      AND src_k8s_top_owner_name != ''
)
WHERE workload IN
(
    SELECT workload
    FROM
    (
        SELECT
            concat(src_k8s_top_owner_namespace, '/', src_k8s_top_owner_kind, '/', src_k8s_top_owner_name) AS workload,
            sum(bytes * if(sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), sampling_rate)) AS total_bytes
        FROM flows_raw
        WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
          AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'
          AND src_k8s_top_owner_name != ''
        GROUP BY workload
        ORDER BY total_bytes DESC
        LIMIT 10
    )
)
GROUP BY time, workload
ORDER BY time ASC

spec.description: Traffic observed on the selected switch, split by source workload. Limited to top 10 source workloads by TX bytes in the selected time range.
spec.title: Observed traffic by workload

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
    concat(src_k8s_top_owner_namespace, '/', src_k8s_top_owner_kind, '/', src_k8s_top_owner_name) AS workload,
    sum(bytes * if(sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), sampling_rate)) AS tx_bytes,
    sum(packets * if(sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), sampling_rate)) AS tx_packets,
    count() AS samples
FROM flows_raw
WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'
  AND src_k8s_top_owner_name != ''
GROUP BY workload
ORDER BY tx_bytes DESC
LIMIT 20

SELECT
    concat(dst_k8s_top_owner_namespace, '/', dst_k8s_top_owner_kind, '/', dst_k8s_top_owner_name) AS workload,
    sum(bytes * if(sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), sampling_rate)) AS rx_bytes,
    sum(packets * if(sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), sampling_rate)) AS rx_packets,
    count() AS samples
FROM flows_raw
WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'
  AND dst_k8s_top_owner_name != ''
GROUP BY workload
ORDER BY rx_bytes DESC
LIMIT 20

SELECT
    src_k8s_pod_namespace AS namespace,
    src_k8s_pod_name AS pod,
    src_k8s_node_name AS node,
    sum(bytes * if(sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), sampling_rate)) AS tx_bytes,
    sum(packets * if(sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), sampling_rate)) AS tx_packets,
    count() AS samples
FROM flows_raw
WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'
  AND src_k8s_pod_name != ''
GROUP BY namespace, pod, node
ORDER BY tx_bytes DESC
LIMIT 20

SELECT
    dst_k8s_pod_namespace AS namespace,
    dst_k8s_pod_name AS pod,
    dst_k8s_node_name AS node,
    sum(bytes * if(sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), sampling_rate)) AS rx_bytes,
    sum(packets * if(sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), sampling_rate)) AS rx_packets,
    count() AS samples
FROM flows_raw
WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'
  AND dst_k8s_pod_name != ''
GROUP BY namespace, pod, node
ORDER BY rx_bytes DESC
LIMIT 20

SELECT
    proto,
    sum(bytes * if(sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), sampling_rate)) AS bytes,
    sum(packets * if(sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), sampling_rate)) AS packets,
    count() AS samples
FROM flows_raw
WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'
GROUP BY proto
ORDER BY bytes DESC
LIMIT 20

spec.name: switch
spec.label: Switch

spec.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
    IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) AS switch
FROM flows_raw
WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
ORDER BY switch

spec.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) AS switch
FROM flows_raw
WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
ORDER BY switch
spec.description: Switch sampler_address rendered as IPv4 string.
